deals.Description: SolidWatts develops solid-state Radio Frequency (RF) platforms for industrial process heating, offering a clean and efficient alternative to fossil fuel-based systems. Their technology enables the electrification of industrial processes across diverse applications.
deals.Investors: Evercurious VC, Kickfund, Axel Carbon Capital, Uni. Fund, Investing for Purpose, Loggerhead, ABB

deals.Description: Plair SA develops and commercializes advanced laser-based instruments for real-time microbial, allergen, and bioaerosol detection. Their systems increase efficiencies and automation in environmental monitoring for improved risk management.

PAVE Space is a Swiss space infrastructure company developing orbital transfer vehicles (OTVs) to move satellites rapidly between orbits. Their technology aims to significantly reduce satellite deployment times and enhance in-space logistics.
deals.Investors: Visionaries Club, Creandum, Lombard Odier Investment Managers, Atlantic Labs, Sistafund, b2venture, ACE Investment Partners, Ilavska Vuillermoz Capital, Pareto Ventures, Motier Ventures
